title: Chinese Buddhist: Jingde Chuandeng Lu (Record of Lamp Transmission) (2)
description: From the Chinese Buddhist canon: Jingde Chuandeng Lu (Record of Lamp Transmission)
introduction: From the Chinese Buddhist canon: Jingde Chuandeng Lu (Record of Lamp Transmission)

translation.text: From Jingde Chuandeng Lu (Record of Lamp Transmission): A core text of Chinese Buddhism, transmitted through the great translation period and forming the basis of East Asian Buddhist practice.
